prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-WHEAT-CERAMIC-PEELER-BEIGE-NCX Product Type: BLADED_FOOD_PEELER Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Wheat Straw Vegetable Peeler with Ceramic Blade, 6.5 Inch Eco Friendly Kitchen Gadget, BPA Free Food Prep Tool, Dishwasher Safe Potato Apple Carrot Peeler Description: Whether batch peeling for mashed potatoes, a few carrots for an afternoon snack or perfect parmesan shavings to top an arugula salad, look no further than Beille’s wheat straw vegetable peeler with ceramic blade. Not only will this quality apple peeler look stylish in any kitchen with its modern and environmentally conscious design, the unique ceramic blade will outperform those traditional metal or stainless steel blades we’ve grown accustomed to.

Made from wheat straw, a bioplastic, the construction is an alternative plant based material to other less forgiving solid plastics; a renewable and sustainable product, Beille’s vegetable peeler is food safe and certified BPA Free. The potato peeler is also dishwasher safe, making for quick and easy clean up after any meal and food prep, cooking or baking.

In addition to the garlic peelers environmental construction, the finishing details are not to be overlooked. Featuring a rounded handle with speckled matte finish, these design features ensure a comfortable and controlled grip when peeling apples, carrots, yams, zucchini and much more! Beille’s vegetable peeler allows for smooth, frictionless peeling and maneuvers easily around hard to reach spots.

Upgrade your current vegetable peeler to a sustainable one, or gift one as a hostess or housewarming gift alongside other items from Beille’s wheat straw kitchen collection! A must have home essentials item or kitchen gadget in any kitchen for the chef or home cook. Search Terms: vegetable peeler ceramic blade potato peeler apple peeler fruit peeler kitchen peeling tool eco friendly kitchen gadget wheat straw utensil BPA free food prep tool ergonomic peeler dishwasher safe cooking accessory carrot zucchini peeler Features: - VEGETABLE PEELER: Beille’s potato peeler is a must have home essentials item to have in your kitchen! The apple peeler features a rounded handle with a speckled matte finish, ensuring a comfortable and controlled grip, making food and meal prep a breeze - CERAMIC BLADE: Beille’s vegetable peeler features a white and very sharp ceramic blade; not only will this quality peeler look stylish in any kitchen with its modern and environmentally conscious design, the ceramic blade will outperform traditional stainless steel blades - WHEAT STRAW: Beille’s vegetable peeler is made of bioplastic wheat straw, an alternative plant based material to other less forgiving solid plastics; a renewable choice and sustainable product, the vegetable peeler is food safe and certified BPA Free - DISHWASHER SAFE: Beille’s wheat straw vegetable peeler mimics similar plastic kitchen tools but without harmful byproducts; the fruit peeler is dishwasher safe, making for a quick and easy cleanup after baking or cooking - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 6.5 x 1 x 1 inches; Weight: 0.08lbs; Color: Beige === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 6.5 Inch Beige Wheat Straw Ceramic Blade Peeler

anthropic.title_differentiation: Ceramic Blade, Eco Friendly Wheat Straw, BPA Free, Dishwasher Safe, Ergonomic Handle

openai.title_differentiation: Ceramic Blade, Wheat Straw Bioplastic, BPA Free, Dishwasher Safe, Ergonomic Grip, Smooth Potato Apple Carrot Peeling
